name: SCC_StartPassive
title: SCC_StartPassive
description: This function activates the Nodelayer DLL, but does not start an SCC simulation (i.e. a state machine). In this state, callbacks can be received, and test functions can be called.

parameters.name: SLACMode
parameters.description: Controls the behavior regarding SLAC, which overrides the parameter <UseSLAC> from the XML configuration:
